pokemon:delphox.name: Delphox
pokemon:delphox.summary: Using psychic power, it generates a fiery vortex of 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit, incinerating foes swept into this whirl of flame.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Using psychic power, it generates a fiery vortex of 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit, incinerating foes swept into this whirl of flame.
It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.
It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.
Using psychic power, it generates a fiery vortex of 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit, incinerating foes swept into this whirl of flame.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Using psychic power, it generates a fiery vortex of 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit, incinerating foes swept into this whirl of flame.

pokemon:fennekin.name: Fennekin
pokemon:fennekin.summary: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.
Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.
Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.
As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.

pokemon:braixen.name: Braixen
pokemon:braixen.summary: When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.
It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle.
It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle.
When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.
